title: Fix review findings - workout save, snapshot hooks, calendar dates, home page, PWA manifest, history date range, snapshot hook order

stories.description: Save completed workouts to IndexedDB in handleWorkoutComplete
acceptanceCriteria: handleWorkoutComplete() in workout.ts:381 calls saveSession(session) before navigating to 'complete'
saveSession() call includes try/catch error handling
handleWorkoutComplete is async (or wraps saveSession in Promise) to ensure save completes before navigation
TypeScript compiles without errors (npm run build)

stories.description: Wire snapshot hooks into timer initialization
acceptanceCriteria: initializeSnapshotHooks(timerEngine) is called after constructing TimerEngine in initializeTimer()
initializeSnapshotHooks is imported from '../timer/snapshot' in workout.ts
npm run build passes

stories.description: Fix history calendar date shift by using plain YYYY-MM-DD formatter
acceptanceCriteria: history.ts:402 getBusinessDate(startOfWeek.getTime()) replaced with plain local date formatter
history.ts:412 getBusinessDate(endOfMonth.getTime()) replaced with plain local date formatter
history.ts:427 getBusinessDate(dayDate.getTime()) replaced with plain local date formatter in generateWeekData
history.ts:457 getBusinessDate(dayDate.getTime()) replaced with plain local date formatter in generateMonthData
Uses Date toLocaleDateString('en-CA') or equivalent YYYY-MM-DD format (no business date offset)
npm run build passes

stories.description: Fix home page completion status check and percentage scale
acceptanceCriteria: home.ts:205 checks session.status === 'completed' (not just session.date === today)
home.ts:217 renders Math.round(session.completionRate * 100) (not Math.round(completionRate))
npm run build passes

stories.description: Fix PWA manifest to reference SVG icons instead of missing PNG files
acceptanceCriteria: public/manifest.json:12 references icon-192x192.svg (not .png)
public/manifest.json:18 references icon-512x512.svg (not .png)
Both icon entries have type: 'image/svg+xml'
Both icon entries have correct sizes values for SVG
npm run build passes

stories.description: Fix history week/month date range off-by-one (week end should be +6 not +7, month end should be last day)
acceptanceCriteria: history.ts:402 endOfWeek is set to startOfWeek.getDate() + 7, which is the day AFTER Sunday — fix to +6 so end date is the last day of the current week
history.ts:412 endOfMonth is set to the 1st of next month — fix to the last day of the current month (lastDay = new Date(year, month + 1, 0))
npm run build passes

stories.description: Move snapshot hook initialization before engine start to avoid crash recovery gap
acceptanceCriteria: initializeSnapshotHooks(timerEngine) is called immediately after constructing TimerEngine, BEFORE calling start() or restoreFromSnapshot()
This ensures hooks are registered before engine's first saveSnapshot() call at engine.ts:67
npm run build passes
